# Copilot Instructions for capture-mike

## Project Overview
Voice-to-text PWA that captures audio, transcribes it, and saves the output as markdown files to a GitHub repo.

## Tech Stack
- Vanilla HTML, CSS, JavaScript (no frameworks)
- Progressive Web App (Service Worker, manifest.json)
- Keep it simple — minimal abstractions, no build tools

## Code Style
- Plain, readable code with minimal abstractions
- ES6+ syntax (const/let, arrow functions, template literals)
- No classes unless truly needed — prefer simple functions
- No unnecessary libraries or dependencies

## Interaction Rules
- ALWAYS ask clarifying questions before making changes
- ALWAYS end by asking me a question with the ask question tool until I answer in the ask question tool that you may stop
- When in plan mode, use the ask question tool to ask numbered questions (1, 2, 3, ...) with 3-5 suggestions (a, b, c, ...) until you have a good understanding of what I want to do. 
- NEVER ask questions in subagents. 
- If you need to ask a question, return to plan mode and ask the question there.. 
- NEVER ask questions in subagents. 
- If you need to ask a question, return to plan mode and ask the question there.
